workspace.docProcessingDesc: Analyze, summarize and extract key insights from complex PDFs and documents.

chat.title: Chat
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type message, press Enter to send...
chat.disclaimer: Content generated by AI, please verify important information.
chat.errorDisconnected: Gateway disconnected, please check network and retry
chat.errorTimeout: Request timeout, possible network instability or server busy, please retry later
chat.errorAuth: Authentication failed, please check API Key configuration
chat.errorRateLimit: Too many requests, please try again later
chat.errorSendFailed: Message send failed, please retry later

quickActions.codeDevelopmentPrompt: Help me write a feature: implement a high-performance Node.js REST API with user authentication, data validation and error handling.
quickActions.officeWorkPrompt: Help me write a professional business email about inviting a project cooperation meeting next week.
quickActions.documentProcessingPrompt: Help me organize a project technical document template including requirements analysis, architecture design, interface definition and deployment plan.
quickActions.dataAnalysisPrompt: Help me analyze user activity data trends, provide key metric change analysis and improvement suggestions.
quickActions.deepResearchPrompt: Search and summarize the latest AI Agent technology development trends, including mainstream framework comparison and application scenarios.
quickActions.slidesPrompt: Help me plan a 10-page product launch presentation outline with the theme of AI-driven intelligent assistant.
quickActions.emailEditingPrompt: Help me write a customer complaint response email, maintaining professional and empathetic tone while proposing solutions.
quickActions.productPlanningPrompt: Help me develop a Q3 product roadmap including core feature iteration planning, technical debt cleanup and user experience optimization.
